question.text: What is the maximum percentage of investable funds that a Category I or II AIF can invest in one investee company?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Category I and II AIFs cannot invest more than 25% of the investable funds in one Investee Company. **The Trap:** 10% is the limit for Category III AIFs, not Category I/II. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Large value funds for accredited investors of Category I/II can invest up to 50% in one company.
